Footer.tagline: Community-contributed practice questions for <link>official GitHub Certifications</link>

Home.heroDescription: Practice with realistic, community-contributed questions across all GitHub certification tracks. Instant feedback, randomized sessions, and focused study — no distractions.
Home.tracksDescription: Five tracks, all free. Community-maintained questions designed to mirror the real exams.
Home.communityDescription: This project is shaped by the community. Every question, fix, and improvement comes from people like you.

PracticeTests.label: Practice Tests
PracticeTests.description: Set the number of questions you want, then jump in. Questions are randomized each session.

QuestionsLibrary.label: Question Library
QuestionsLibrary.title: Browse all questions
QuestionsLibrary.description: Explore every question organized by certification track. Pick a category to study at your own pace.
QuestionsLibrary.contributePrompt: Want to contribute? <link>Add your own questions →</link>

Quiz.reportTooltip: Report an issue with this question
Quiz.contributePrompt: Enjoying these questions? Help grow the collection.
Quiz.submitDialogDescription: Once submitted, you'll see your score and can review each question.
Quiz.submitDialogWarning: You have {unanswered} unanswered and {partial} partially answered questions. These will count as incorrect.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningUnanswered: You have {count} unanswered questions. These will count as incorrect.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningPartial: You have {count} partially answered questions. These will count as incorrect.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningBoth: You have {unanswered} unanswered and {partial} partially answered questions. These will count as incorrect.

QuestionBrowser.reportTooltip: Report an issue with this question

Games.label: Games
Games.description: Put your certification knowledge to the test with high-stakes game modes. Compete for the top of the leaderboard.
Games.gauntletDescription: One life. Every question matters. A wrong answer ends your run immediately. Questions from all certifications.
Games.timeTrialDescription: Race the clock. Correct answers add time, wrong answers drain it. How many can you answer before time runs out?
Games.suggestGameDescription: Have an idea for a new game mode? Propose it on GitHub and let the community vote. The most popular ideas get built.
Games.suggestRule1: Propose a new game mode via the issue form
Games.suggestRule2: Vote on existing ideas with reactions
Games.gauntletRule1: You get {lives} lives — mess up and they're gone forever 💀
Games.gauntletRule2: {seconds}s on the clock per question — tick tock!
Games.gauntletRule3: Questions pulled from every cert track — no hiding
Games.gauntletRule4: Your streak IS your score — survive or cry trying
Games.timeTrialRule1: You start with 60 seconds — that's it, good luck ⏱️
Games.timeTrialRule2: Nail it? +10 seconds. Keep the clock alive!
Games.timeTrialRule4: Clock hits zero = game over. No mercy 🪦
Games.signInToSave: Sign in with GitHub to save

Gauntlet.wrongLifeLost: Wrong answer — you lost a life!
Gauntlet.timeUpLifeLost: Time's up — you lost a life!
Gauntlet.pauseBanner: Finish this question — the game will pause before the next one.
Gauntlet.pausedDescription: Take your time. The timer will restart when you resume.
Gauntlet.reportTooltip: Report an issue with this question

TimeTrial.title: Time Trial
TimeTrial.pauseBanner: Finish this question — the game will pause before the next one.
TimeTrial.pausedDescription: Take a breather. The clock is frozen until you resume.
TimeTrial.comingSoonDescription: Time Trial mode is under development. Race the clock — correct answers add time, wrong answers drain it.
TimeTrial.reportTooltip: Report an issue with this question

CertDescriptions.actions: Master CI/CD, workflow triggers, jobs, steps, secrets, and GitHub-hosted runners.
CertDescriptions.foundations: Core concepts, repositories, issues, pull requests, GitHub Flow, and Codespaces.
CertDescriptions.advanced_security: Secret scanning, code scanning with CodeQL, security policies, and Dependabot alerts.
CertDescriptions.admin: Managing organizations, teams, permissions, billing, and enterprise-level GitHub.
CertDescriptions.copilot: AI pair programming, prompt engineering, Copilot features, and responsible use.
